events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a T&P (Temperature and Pressure) relief valve discharge pipe that is missing/trapped/reduced/terminated too high. This is a clear code violation under both IPC 504 and IRC P2804, which govern water heater T&P relief valve discharge piping requirements.

Key issues:
- T&P discharge pipe must not be trapped
- Must not be reduced in size
- Must terminate appropriately (not too high)
- Must be installed properly

This is a safety hazard - the T&P valve is a critical safety device that prevents water heater explosion from excessive pressure/temperature. Improper discharge piping means the safety device may not function correctly.

Decision: fail
Risk: high or critical - a malfunctioning T&P discharge could lead to explosion risk
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Work stage: rough-complete
Percent complete: maybe 85-90% since it's roughed in but has this defect

Let me construct the JSON.
